documentation.description:
This package offers a straightforward method for setting up the QMC5883L
when connected via I2C, especially useful when you need multiple sensors
of this kind. If you use only one sensor, it could be preferable to use the
QMC5883L.Sensor generic package.

tagged_types.name: QMC5883_Sensor
tagged_types.code:
type QMC5883_Sensor
  (I2C_Port : not null HAL.I2C.Any_I2C_Port) is tagged limited private;

documentation.description: Read the chip ID and check that it matches the expected value.

subprograms.name: Configure

documentation.description:
Setup sensor configuration, including
* Over sample rate
* Output data rate
* Full scale field range
* Operating mode
Check if the operating mode is idle

subprograms.name: Read_Measurement

documentation.description: Read scaled measurement values from the sensor

subprograms.name: Read_Raw_Measurement

documentation.description: Read the raw measurement values from the sensor

subprograms.name: Reset

documentation.description: Soft reset, restore default value of all registers.
